sourceNotes: Astypalaia local-source pass 2026-05-26: OSM way 1083976469 and AllOverGreece GPS 36.51417,26.33813 identify this record as Agios Ioannis Richtis. Sources describe boat access or a difficult 30-40 minute descent from the chapel, pebbles, no organization, and secluded conditions.

accessNotes.en: Gnosti apomonomeni paralia sti dytiki Astypalaia. I pio eykoli prosvasi perigrafetai me karavaki/idiotiko skafos, me pezoporiki katavasi mono gia empeirous.
accessNotes.gr: Γνωστή απομονωμένη παραλία στη δυτική Αστυπάλαια. Η πιο εύκολη πρόσβαση περιγράφεται με καραβάκι/ιδιωτικό σκάφος, με πεζοπορική κατάβαση μόνο για έμπειρους.
accessNotes.fr: Gnosti apomonomeni paralia sti dytiki Astypalaia. I pio eykoli prosvasi perigrafetai me karavaki/idiotiko skafos, me pezoporiki katavasi mono gia empeirous.

waterDepth.notes: Οι πηγές αναφέρουν βότσαλο και βαθιά νερά.

sourceNotes: Astypalaia local-source pass 2026-05-26: OSM way 498037137 and AllOverGreece GPS 36.5497,26.27824 identify this western Astypalaia record as Agios Ioannis. Astypalaia-island and AllOverGreece describe boat/private-boat access as easiest, descent from the chapel for hikers, pebble beach, deep water, and no organized services; Thalassopouli distinguishes Agios Ioannis Makris from Agios Ioannis Richtis.

accessNotes.en: I Kounoypa einai nisida tis Astypalaias kai proseggizetai mono me skafos, synithos me imerisia ekdromi i touristiko karavaki apo ton Pera Gialo, an to epitrepei o kairos.
accessNotes.gr: Η Κουνούπα είναι νησίδα της Αστυπάλαιας και προσεγγίζεται μόνο με σκάφος, συνήθως με ημερήσια εκδρομή ή τουριστικό καραβάκι από τον Πέρα Γιαλό, αν το επιτρέπει ο καιρός.

metadata.sourceNotes: Phase 2 Batch 3I source check 2026-05-25: the official Astypalaia route list includes route 8 through Lantes; Travel.gr describes the Agios Panteleimonas-Panormos hike reaching Lantes first; FotoTravel marks Landes as hiking access. Corrected from strict boat-only access to difficult path access.

accessNotes.en: To Magazaki den einai paralia mono me varka. Pigi paralion Astypalaias anaferei katavasi apo monopati peripou 5-10 lepton.
accessNotes.gr: Το Μαγαζάκι δεν είναι παραλία μόνο με βάρκα. Πηγή παραλιών Αστυπάλαιας αναφέρει κατάβαση από μονοπάτι περίπου 5-10 λεπτών.

metadata.sourceNotes: Phase 2 Batch 3I source check 2026-05-25: GreekTravel describes Marmari as a beach a few hundred meters down the road with the popular Ta Mamounia cafe; Greece Moments describes Marmari near the main road and Mamounia All Day Bar serving drinks/snacks in midsummer. Corrected from strict boat-only to road access, with beach bar kept separate from taverna.

metadata.sourceNotes: Phase 2 Batch 3I source check 2026-05-25: Aegean Islands describes the western Astypalaia trail from Livadi through Papou; Astypalea.net lists Papou among the beaches reached by those with transportation from Livadi, while only later beaches are described as boat-access; FotoTravel marks Papou Beach-Faso as hiking access. Corrected from strict boat-only access to difficult path access.

accessNotes.en: Den yparchei akomi source-backed endeixi gia chomatodromo, monopati i eykoli odiki prosvasi. Krata tin prosvasi os mi epivevaiomeni mechri na prostethei amesi pigi.
accessNotes.gr: Δεν υπάρχει ακόμη source-backed ένδειξη για χωματόδρομο, μονοπάτι ή εύκολη οδική πρόσβαση. Κράτα την πρόσβαση ως μη επιβεβαιωμένη μέχρι να προστεθεί άμεση πηγή.
